summary: Iteration 35 - Performance Report Generation Feature Testing Complete. All P2 features verified working: 1) GET /api/profit/report/base64 returns base64 PNG image with stats, 2) GET /api/profit/report/image returns PNG file for download, 3) Generate Report button visible on Profit Tracker page, 4) Report dialog shows period selection (Daily/Weekly/Monthly) and Preview/Download buttons, 5) Preview displays generated report image with account stats.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Report Generation feature fully implemented and tested. Backend uses PIL/Pillow to generate dark-themed PNG images. Frontend dialog at ProfitTrackerPage.jsx lines 1355-1419. API endpoints: GET /api/profit/report/base64 (preview), GET /api/profit/report/image (download). Report shows account value, profit stats, win rate, recent trades.

report_base64_endpoint.details: GET /api/profit/report/base64 returns JSON with image_base64, period, generated_at, and stats. Supports daily/weekly/monthly periods. Default is monthly.

report_image_endpoint.details: GET /api/profit/report/image returns PNG binary with Content-Type: image/png and Content-Disposition header for download. Filename includes period and date.

generate_report_button.details: Button visible on Profit Tracker page with data-testid='generate-report-button'. Located in action bar between Commission Records and Reset Tracker.

report_dialog.details: Dialog shows 'Performance Report' title, Report Period dropdown (Daily/Weekly/Monthly), Preview Report button, and Download PNG button.

report_preview.details: Preview displays generated PNG image with CrossCurrent branding, user name, date, account value, profit stats, win rate, avg/trade, best/worst trade, streak, and footer.

authentication_required.details: Both report endpoints return 401/403 when accessed without authentication token.

api_tests.GET /api/profit/report/base64?period=wee: PASS - Returns base64 PNG with stats

ui_tests.profit_tracker_page_load: PASS - Page loads with all elements
ui_tests.generate_report_button_visible: PASS - Button visible with correct testid
ui_tests.preview_functionality: PASS - Generates and displays report image

features: Shows account value, profit, trades, win rate, avg/trade, best/worst trade, streak
GET /api/profit/report/base64 - Returns JSON with base64 image
Both support period param: daily, weekly, monthly
